arts.ttl: 'Nobody knows what to expect' - Marcus Rashford gives verdict on new Manchester United system
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford scored twice in Man United's 4-0 win over Everton at Old Trafford on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford reveals how Ruben Amorim has lifted Man United since replacing Erik ten Hag - after scoring twice in 4-0 win over Everton
arts.sum: Despite flickering in and out of form under Ten Hag, Rashford has been pivotal to Amorim's start, with his second and third goals of the new era arriving on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim praises Ruud van Nistelrooy after Manchester United 4-0 win vs Everton
arts.sum: Man Utd won 4-0 against Everton in the Premier League and Amad provided two assists in the second half.

arts.ttl: 'It's just madness' - Dyche perplexed by Everton defending
arts.sum: Everton manager Sean Dyche says his side's defending for Manchester United's third goal was "madness" in their 4-0 loss at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man United star in dazzling form hailed by Ruben Amorim as Red Devils show encouraging signs against Everton
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim praises Amad Diallo for his performance against Everton but calls for further improvement across the board.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 4-0 Everton: Match report and talking points from thumping Old Trafford win
arts.sum: 4 key takeaways from Ruben Amorim's first Premier League victory as Man Utd manager.

arts.ttl: Rashford and Zirkzee double up as Manchester United dismantle Everton
arts.sum: “Ruben Amorim, Ruben Amorim, nananaanananaaa” chorused the jubilant Manchester United fans following the impressive Joshua Zirkzee’s second goal. Sung to the melody of KC and the Sunshine Band’s Give It Up, this was the last thing the new manager’s players did: fail to go after any apparent lost cause just in case gold could be mined. It was how Zirkzee struck United’s fourth. From deep in his area the replacement Luke Shaw headed out. The ball came to Amad Diallo who rolled it along the right wing into space. Over thundered Marcus Rashford who failed to connect but, when the ball was passed back to James Tarkowski, there was Diallo harrying. Everton’s captain dawdled, the right wingback pilfered possession, sprinted ahead, squared left to United’s centre-forward, and he rammed home. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's impact on three Man Utd stars shows why Old Trafford can believe again
arts.sum: MAN UTD 4-0 EVERTON: Marcus Rashford and Joshua Zikrzee each bagged a brace in Ruben Amorim's first Premier League home game, with the electirc Amad providing two assists

arts.ttl: Manchester United 4-0 Everton PLAYER RATINGS: Who showed they can be a diamond under Ruben Amorim? Which Red Devils star looked off the pace? And which Everton defender had a NIGHTMARE?
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT AT OLD TRAFFORD: Everton fans exited Old Trafford en masse before the final whistle after what was a defeat littered with defensive mistakes that gift-wrapped this win.

arts.ttl: Liam Delap latest: Chelsea and Man Utd face SHOCK competition
arts.sum: “My full focus is on this season and, with regards to Liam, trying to help him to continue to improve. The Serbian forward has been linked with a big-money move to the Premier League in recent years and Juventus reportedly sent scouts to watch Delap in action against Man Utd last weekend as they eye a possible deal for the 21-year-old.
